examples: These six things doth the LORD hate: yea, seven are an abomination unto him.
Divers weights are an abomination unto the LORD; and a false balance is not good.
Divers weights [are] an abomination unto the LORD; and a false balance [is] not good.
Those who regarded the poll tax as an evil abomination will, equally, neither forgive nor forget.
New Jersey's public schools in cities such as Newark and Camden are an abomination.
